findings.quote: ds the amount  paid by Sponsor, no other sponsor shall receive any benefit of greater value (including either an equivalent or a more prominent use of another  sponsor's name, logo or other identifying information) than the Benefits provided to the Sponsor hereunder.
findings.why: MFN protection ensuring no other sponsor at equal or lesser fee receives more valuable benefits than Sponsor.

findings.quote: Notwithstanding the provisions of Section 1 hereof, the Sponsor shall have the right at any time prior to  December 31, 2010 to terminate this Agreement by giving written notice of such termination to Racing. In the event of such a termination, (i) the  Sponsor shall have no further obligation to make payments toward the sponsorship fee contemplated in Section 3 hereof, (ii) Racing shall have no  further obligation to provide any Benefits hereunder, and (iii) the remaining provisions of this Agreement shall remain in full force and effect.
findings.why: Sponsor may terminate at any time for any reason on written notice, without cause — a unilateral convenience termination right.

findings.quote: Neither party shall assign any of its rights or obligations hereunder without the prior written consent of the other party.
findings.why: Both parties are prohibited from assigning rights or obligations without the other's prior written consent.
